5th China CSS Developer Conference — Notes on Zhang Xinxu's Talk
On 2019-03-20 in Shenzhen, the CSS Developer Conference (hosted by W3C and W3ctech) took place. Footage is on YouTube. These are my recreation notes from Zhang Xinxu's talk.
Hexschool's FLEXPIRATE — Learning Flexbox by Sinking Pirate Ships
Hexschool released a game called FLEXPIRATE for learning Flexbox. I'm a Hexschool student so naturally I played it — notes from the experience.
